events.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this event?
events.whatsappNotInstalled: WhatsApp is not installed on this device.
events.chooseWishTemplateDesc: Select the message to send to {{name}}
events.wishTemplate1: Happy birthday {{name}}! 🎂🎉 Hope you're having a wonderful day!
events.wishTemplate2: Wishing you an amazing birthday {{name}}! 🎁✨ May all your dreams come true!
events.wishTemplate4: {{name}}, may this special day be the beginning of a wonderful year! 🌟 Happy birthday with all my heart!
events.wishTemplate5: Another year older, another year better! 😄 Happy birthday {{name}}! 🎂🎉 You're the best!

eventForm.title: Title
eventForm.timeCapsulaPlaceholder: Write a private note that will appear on the event day... (e.g. last year you gave them a book)

settings.title: Settings
settings.weeklyDigestDesc: Every Monday morning, a recap of the week's events
settings.yourDataDescription: Your events are saved only on your device. We never send your data to any server.
settings.privacyPolicyText: Data controller: Giampietro Leonoro, smemorandum.support@gmail.com. The app does not collect or transmit personal data; all data is stored exclusively on the user's device. Under GDPR, users have the right to access, rectify, and erase their data. To exercise these rights, contact the data controller. Last updated: April 2026.
settings.adConsentInfo: Smemorandum shows ads to support the free development of the app. You can choose personalized ads (based on your interests) or anonymous ads. Premium users see no ads.
settings.cookiePolicyText: Smemorandum uses Google AdMob to display ads to non-Premium users. Anonymous ads do not collect personal data. If you choose personalized ads, Google may use an anonymous advertising identifier. You can change your preference in Settings > Privacy. Last updated: April 2026.
settings.termsOfServiceText: The app is provided as-is, without warranties of any kind. The user is responsible for backing up their own data; the owner is not liable for any data loss. The app may be updated or discontinued at any time. Disputes are governed by Italian law. Contact: smemorandum.support@gmail.com. Last updated: April 2026.
settings.ownerDescription: This app is owned and developed by {{name}}. For any questions or requests, contact: {{email}}.

backup.importConfirmMessage: Your current data will be replaced with the backup data. Do you want to continue?
backup.importError: Invalid file. Please select a Smemorandum backup file.

importContacts.title: Import contacts
importContacts.tapImportedHint: Tap an already-imported contact to remove it from the app.
importContacts.removeConfirmMessage: {{count}} imported birthdays will be deleted. Contacts on your phone are not affected.
importContacts.noContacts: No contacts in your address book have a birthday saved.
importContacts.permissionDenied: Contacts access denied. Enable the permission in your device settings.

premium.title: Smemorandum Premium
premium.subtitle: Ad-free experience + extra features
premium.alreadyPremium: You're already Premium! Thank you for your support.
premium.purchaseSuccess: Welcome to Premium! All features are now unlocked.
premium.purchaseError: Purchase failed. Please try again later.
premium.webNotSupported: Purchases are only available in the mobile app.
premium.legalNote: Subscription renews automatically. Cancel anytime via App Store / Google Play settings. Prices include applicable taxes.

onboarding.slide1Description: Never forget an important anniversary or deadline again
onboarding.slide2Description: Categories, calendar and search to keep everything under control
onboarding.slide3Description: Receive sound alerts for every important event

tutorial.step1Description: Here you'll find your upcoming events organized by today, this week, and this month.
tutorial.step2Description: Tap the + button to add a new recurring event or deadline.
tutorial.step3Description: Use the bottom bar to switch between Home, Calendar, Events, and Settings.
tutorial.step4Description: Recurring events repeat over time (birthdays, anniversaries). Deadlines have a specific due date (bills, renewals).
tutorial.step5Description: Tap Calendar to see all your events in a monthly view. Tap any day to see its details.
tutorial.step6Description: In Settings you can change the language, theme, and manage your preferences.
tutorial.step7Description: Go to Settings > Data to automatically import birthdays from your contacts. No need to enter them manually!
tutorial.step8Description: Also in Settings > Data, you can export a backup of your events and restore them on another device.

manageCategories.title: Manage categories
